component.name: Mirror's Edge Tweaks
component.summary: Game fixes and tweaks for Mirror's Edge on Steam

description.p: A Linux-native port of softsoundd's Mirror's Edge Tweaks, for the Steam version of Mirror's Edge (2008) running under Proton. All changes are persistent file modifications - no memory hooks or injection.

ul.li: Developer console and command-line argument unlocking
Field-of-view editing and unlocked aspect ratios
High-resolution UI fix and full graphics customisation
FPS limiter control and PhysX cloth tuning
Custom keybinds, speedrun macros, and gamepad button prompts
Game language switching and OpenAL Soft audio with HRTF

description.p: Automatically finds the game across Steam libraries (native and Flatpak Steam) and edits configs inside the game's Proton prefix. Mirror's Edge must be launched once via Steam before config tweaks become available.
This project is not affiliated with EA or DICE. Based on MirrorsEdgeTweaks by softsoundd (MIT licence).
